artifact: EQO/1 machine-readable vocabulary export — the registries and enumerations of the standard in one structured file. Consumers (viewers, validators, build pipelines) read this artifact; parsing the specification prose is not a supported interface. Normative basis: ADDENDUM-C.md; content mirrors SPECIFICATION.md and the addenda.

MEC.label: Mechanical
MEC.summary: Levitation, thrust, spin-up, deformation, oscillation, fluid motion — and mechanical self-runners

THM.label: Thermal
THM.summary: Heat balance, local heating, cooling without a documented sink, anomalous transport

NUC.label: Nuclear / material
NUC.summary: Elemental and isotopic analysis, radiation, fusion products, microcraters and new phases

EMG.label: Electromagnetic
EMG.summary: Field signatures, induction, electrical energy balance, discharge and plasma, correlations

GRA.label: Gravitational
GRA.summary: Weight change, field shadows, gyroscope anomalies, inertia and free-fall deviations

OPT.label: Optical
OPT.summary: Glow and aura, plasma balls, refraction and imaging anomalies, mist formation

ACU.label: Acoustic
ACU.summary: Spontaneous tones, infra- and ultrasound, resonance transfer over distance

CHM.label: Chemical
CHM.summary: Reaction and combustion anomalies, electrochemical figures, phase and substance properties

BIO.label: Biological
BIO.summary: Growth effects, physiological sensations, cellular findings, effects on microorganisms

INS.label: Instrument reading
INS.summary: The instrument reading is the sole observable, or the instrument itself is affected

SON.label: Other
SON.summary: Residual — anything the classes above do not cover

reserved_classes.ENV: Environment/geophysics (weather-modification and seismic claims) — namespace reserved, unpopulated

leaves.P-MEC-LEV-03: Near-ground hovering/gliding, or anomalously easy handling of heavy objects
leaves.P-MEC-KIN-01: Directed thrust on an apparatus (observed, or measured on balance/torsion balance)
leaves.P-MEC-KIN-04: Precession behavior deviating from model (incl. Foucault pendulum plane)
leaves.P-MEC-KIN-07: Motion response deviating from the force/inertia budget
leaves.P-MEC-KIN-10: Continued motion without documented energy input (mechanical self-runners)
leaves.P-MEC-DEF-01: Metal deformation without documented signs of heating
leaves.P-MEC-DEF-04: Cold joining/fusing (visual/mechanical; analytic finding is P-NUC-ELM-03)
leaves.P-MEC-DEF-05: Embedding of foreign bodies in solids
leaves.P-MEC-FLU-01: Fluid motion without documented drive (vortices, climbing)
leaves.P-THM-BIL-01: Heat output in excess of accounted input (calorimetry)
leaves.P-THM-BIL-02: Heat generation spatially separated from the apparatus
leaves.P-THM-LOK-04: IR signature without corresponding contact/ambient measurement
leaves.P-THM-KLT-02: Cooling of current-carrying conductors under load
leaves.P-THM-TRN-01: Temperature gradient against expected heat flow
leaves.P-THM-TRN-02: Heat conduction deviating from material constants
leaves.P-NUC-ELM-01: Changed elemental inventory in before/after analyses
leaves.P-NUC-ELM-03: Elemental intermixing in joint zones (analytic finding)
leaves.P-NUC-ELM-04: Detection of fusion products above expectation (He-4, tritium)
leaves.P-NUC-STR-01: Emission of ionizing radiation without documented source
leaves.P-EMG-IND-02: Capacitance/inductance values deviating from geometry and material
leaves.P-EMG-BIL-02: Continued operation of electromagnetic systems without accounted input
leaves.P-EMG-BIL-05: Voltage/current generation under gradients or load (thermo-, piezo-, triboelectric, photovoltaic instances)
leaves.P-EMG-ENT-01: Plasma/discharge formation at atypically low voltage or with work output
leaves.P-EMG-KOR-01: Correlated signals without documented transmission path
leaves.P-GRA-GEW-01: Weight change under influence (sign/magnitude as measured value)
leaves.P-GRA-GEW-02: Reduced weight in the "field shadow" of an apparatus (static)
leaves.P-GRA-GEW-05: Spatially bounded zone of deviant weight measurements
leaves.P-GRA-INR-01: Acceleration response deviating from applied force
leaves.P-GRA-INR-02: Free-fall acceleration deviating from local g
leaves.P-GRA-SIG-01: Periodic/transient signals in gravimeters and balances
leaves.P-OPT-EMI-01: Visible glow/aura on apparatus or objects
leaves.P-OPT-EMI-02: UV/IR emission without thermally corresponding source
leaves.P-OPT-EMI-03: Luminescence under mechanical, acoustic, or electrical action
leaves.P-OPT-MED-02: Anomalies in the image content of recordings (device malfunction is P-INS-ELK-01)
leaves.P-CHM-RKT-01: Gas evolution deviating from the reaction budget
leaves.P-CHM-PHS-02: Property change of water without compositional change

M-CAS.label: Casimir (real effect; extraction claims are M-ZPE)

M-ART-FAB.label: Fabricated report (print/media hoax as documented finding)

mechanism_statuses.established: Accepted physics; artifact classes count as established for theory embedding

edge_roles.claimed: The source offers this mechanism as the explanation
edge_roles.discussed: Named as a candidate in sources or secondary literature
edge_roles.excluded_per_source: The source claims to have excluded it — what is indexed is the exclusion claim

relation_types.replicates: A later observation that repeats the earlier one
relation_types.contradicts: A later observation that contradicts the earlier one — e.g. a null-result re-test
relation_types.confirms_per_source: Confirmation as asserted by the source itself

D.name: Documentation
D.description: How the observation is recorded — second-hand account through peer-reviewed paper

R.name: Replication
R.description: Whether anyone reproduced it — never attempted through independently documented

C.name: Controls
C.description: What was controlled for — none through a full energy balance

grades.3: independent second instrument or relevant environmental exclusion

P.name: Provenance
P.description: Who documented it — anonymous through adversarial examination on record

T.name: Theory embedding
T.description: Whether an established mechanism explains it — none on record through established and claimed

Q.name: Quantification
Q.description: How it was measured — qualitative through quantitative with uncertainty

unknown_grade.label: Not assessed
unknown_grade.semantics: Unknown is never the lowest grade — an unassessed axis is missing data, not a zero; distance computations drop it pairwise

EP-4.label: Historical-anecdotal
EP-4.description: Historical-anecdotal — a document or an account, no measurement on record

EP-5.label: Orthodox-covered
EP-5.description: Orthodox-covered — an established mechanism is claimed for it

S-HUT.label: Hutchison
S-HUT.definition: (MEC-DEF or MEC-LEV) with (NUC-ELM or OPT or INS or BIO-WRK-02)

S-BRN.label: Biefeld-Brown
S-BRN.definition: (MEC-KIN-01 or MEC-LEV or GRA-GEW-01) under high-voltage input

S-SRL.label: Searl
S-SRL.definition: MEC-KIN-03 with GRA-GEW-01, OPT-EMI-01 and THM-KLT-01

S-AST.label: Astronomically modulated
S-AST.definition: (GRA or MEC-KIN-04 or EMG-KOR) with astronomical modulator

S-OFN.label: Open
S-OFN.definition: Derived — observation without edge to an established mechanism (T0); the operational anomaly definition

no_edge_convention.note: Orthodox anchors and null results (⊕) — a record with no anomalous phenomenon to explain carries T4 by convention

doctrine.label: Doctrine
doctrine.summary: Theory-first bodies of claim, indexed as their own object type rather than as observations

narrative.label: Narrative
narrative.summary: Lore and conspiracy complexes, split into documented kernel and added layer

compilation_confidence.high: Compiler recall of name, principals, era and phenomenology is reliable
compilation_confidence.low: Known only in outline — verify before use
